title: Possibility to export Subitems or specific elements/rows only.
excerpt: I just want to download subitems only to create more possibility for members. It should be possible to select the specific items to export. Without Monday Logo in Headline or the Item above.

posts.author: Weinwolf (Marina Kennel)
